body: Meeting at the Cody library Thursday 7pm on the consolidation proposal. Bring a neighbor.
subject: Sage Creek meeting Thursday

body: Eighty-five families turned out. Board tabled the vote. Keep at it.
subject: Coalition update - November

body: Signs are in. Pick up at the ranch gate or call and I will drop a stack by.
subject: Yard signs ready

body: If your kids ride the bus from the valley, the new plan adds an hour each way. Come say so.
subject: Pronghorn Valley parents

body: Regular board meeting Monday 6pm at the district office. Public comment is open.
subject: Board meeting Monday

body: Six hundred signatures and counting. Thank you. Mail the last sheets to the ranch.
subject: Petition count

body: Got the district mileage figures. They do not add up. Details at the next meeting.
subject: Bus route numbers

body: Need folks for phone calls and door knocking this month. Reply if you can spare an evening.
subject: Volunteer sign up

body: Quiet over the holidays. Vote moves to the new year. Rest up.
subject: Coalition update - December

body: The state wants enrollment numbers by January. We will have our own count ready.
subject: Enrollment hearing

body: School open house Friday afternoon. Show them the building is full and worth keeping.
subject: Sage Creek open house

body: New year, same fight. Budget hearing is the one to watch.
subject: Coalition update - January

body: Driving to the capitol for the committee hearing. Two seats open. Call the ranch.
subject: Ride share to Cheyenne

body: Long winter and you all stuck with it. The valley schools are still open. That is the work.
subject: Thank you

body: Fall meetings start back up. First one is at the library. See you there.
subject: Coalition update - October

body: Meeting at the Cody library Thursday 7pm on the consolidation proposal. Bring a neighbor.
subject: Sage Creek meeting Thursday

body: Eighty-five families turned out. Board tabled the vote. Keep at it.
subject: Coalition update - November

body: Signs are in. Pick up at the ranch gate or call and I will drop a stack by.
subject: Yard signs ready

body: If your kids ride the bus from the valley, the new plan adds an hour each way. Come say so.
subject: Pronghorn Valley parents

body: Regular board meeting Monday 6pm at the district office. Public comment is open.
subject: Board meeting Monday
